executives.name: Barbara Novick
executives.background: Barbara G. Novick has been a director since 2022. She is a co-founder of BlackRock, Inc. and served as Vice Chairman until 2021.

executives.name: Charles Robbins
executives.background: Chuck Robbins is Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cisco. He has served as CEO since July 2015 and was elected Chair of the Board in December 2017. Prior to that, he held various leadership positions at Cisco since joining in 1997, including Senior Vice President of Worldwide Field Operations.

executives.name: Dominik Rohe
executives.background: Managing Director of BlackRock, Inc. since 2005. Head of BlackRock’s Latin America & Caribbean region from 2016 to 2019. Head of BlackRock’s Institutional Client Business in Germany, Austria and Eastern Europe from 2013 to 2016.

executives.name: Joseph Cavatoni
executives.background: Mr. Cavatoni is the Principal Executive Officer of World Gold Trust Services, LLC (the "Sponsor"). He has been with the World Gold Council since 2016 and previously held senior roles at BlackRock and UBS.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director, iShares Capital Markets – Americas

executives.name: Kenneth Dunn
executives.background: Professor of Financial Economics at Carnegie Mellon University. Director since 2010.

executives.name: Sue Wagner
executives.background: Ms. Wagner is a co-founder of BlackRock, Inc. and served as its Vice Chairman from 2006 to 2012.
